title: Generating a Correctly Implemented Merge Sort Algorithm
scenario: Write a function that implements the merge sort algorithm to sort an array of integers. The input will be an array of integers. The function should return a sorted array using the merge sort algorithm.
constraints: Must use the standard merge sort algorithm
Must handle edge cases where the input array is empty or has only one element

evaluationCriteria.description: The function implements the correct merge sort logic to sort the array.
The function returns a correctly sorted array using the merge sort algorithm.
The code adheres to standard Python syntax and formatting.
The function is implemented efficiently and uses the optimal number of operations.
